title: wrong scoping for cross-schema view references
key_bug_features: cross-schema view references with incorrect scoping
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE s1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE s2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, description TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE s3 (x INT CHECK (x > 0), y FLOAT DEFAULT NULL);
SELECT * FROM s3 WHERE x IN (SELECT id FROM s1 WHERE name IS NOT NULL);
